Always has these weird things happening at the worst possible times, but I'm on now and I'm excited to have you guys here. We have a ton of you guys on, so this is exciting. For some of you guys, this is your first experience with the Black Box funnel. Some of you guys have been doing this stuff for a while, and so I'm really excited. This is kind of part of a mini class we're doing. Basically, I'm going to be helping you guys build out a Black Box funnel as quick as possible. It should be really cool. Then what I was going to do for this is I was going to actually build a Black Box funnel with you guys over the shoulder while you guys are building it. Our mission for the last almost 10 years now, we've been working with people to build out sales funnels. It's been a ton of fun. We've always experimented with different ways, different types of funnels. There's a lot of different things you can do and different ways to do it. The Black Box funnel is one that's really true to my heart because it's a really cool way where I believe and we've proven in tons of different places that you can literally sell just about anything without actually having to do any selling, which is kind of nice for those of us who are educators who like to teach and to train and to show and to give and to provide value. You can do that and still make money on the other side of it. That's what the Black Box funnel is. One of the things a lot of you guys have asked about is click funnels. Obviously, to be able to create a Black Box funnel, you're going to need access to click funnels. To jump into this and just start having some fun and start going through everything, the first thing I want to do is I want to give a really quick recap for those who may not remember exactly what the Black Box funnel is. Basically, these are the different pieces of it. It starts with the free plus shipping product. After somebody purchases that first product, the next page they're taking into a page where there's a case study, some kind of video here that sells them into an invisible funnel style event. When an invisible funnel style event comes in and they put in their credit card and you don't charge them right away, or if you do, you charge them a minimal fee like a dollar or so. You let them come to the webinar, hang out, learn, and you can basically teach and train and give as much value as possible for as long as you want. Most of my invisible, actually, I think all of the ones I've done so far, I think the shortest one was three and a half hours. The longest one, probably a little over four. I have some friends, I had a friend who did an invisible funnel webinar the other day. It was eight hours. I don't know how he did it without just collapsing. I thought other people do them for an hour, some people in two hours. The length doesn't matter. What matters is you just provide the most amazing results possible. The most value you can give someone, you give it to them. At the end of it, they have a chance to decide and they kind of vote and say, yes, this was awesome. I loved it. Because of that, I'm willing to pay and then you build their credit card. Or they can say, you know, it wasn't as great as I thought. Please don't bill me and they don't. What happens is if you don't bill that person's credit card, you gave them all that value. They love you. They build a great relationship with you. They'll come back over and over and over again. Usually, the end of the invisible funnel event, we give people the opportunity to come work with us. Usually, we'll send them to an application where they can apply to work with us. We have a whole system that we kind of go through to help close that person on a higher ticket sale. That's kind of in a nutshell what the black box funnel looks like. If you don't put in the effort on your side, then you're going to miss this. Make sure you guys apply it on your side. Let me dive into this. This is the overview. These are the things you guys need to be able to have to launch your first black box funnel. The first thing you need to do is have your free plus shipping product. We talked a lot about this. I don't know if I shared this example with the superhero summoner or not. I can't remember. In fact, I have it on my other slides. This is from a different presentation. It's worth sharing because this is awesome. This is a concept we call the 100 visitor test. This obviously I didn't do this with just 100 visitors. We did it with a much larger sample size of hundreds of thousands of people. We broke it down to 100 visitors just to show you why this free plus shipping thing is so important. We took our entire segment and we broke it down to 100 visitors. We sent 100 visitors. We're selling our product. Let's say it was a $197 product. To sell a $197 product, I needed a really, really, good sales letter to sell that. That's an expensive product. I need an awesome sales letter to sell it. It usually costs a lot of money, time, and energy. If I did a great job, I'd get 1% of the people to buy. For every 100 visitors I sent this website, one cent conversion, I'd make $197. Not too bad as long as I'm spending less than $197 to get those 100 visitors to my website. There was the old way that we used to do it. A while ago, we had this idea. We took part of our product out and took a piece of it, like the best part. We gave it away for free plus shipping. If anyone's heard my rant before, I'm a big, big believer of free plus shipping. I guarantee some of you guys are going to email me and message me and say, Russell, why can't I just give it away as a digital downloader? Why can't I do it like a $7 report like everybody else does? Why can't I do? The reason why is there's some magic behind the word free. You've heard that your whole life, but free really is a magic marketing word. It's amazing what people do for free. You've seen some of my products. We have free books, we have free CDs, we have free MP3 players. We have free stuff all day long. That word free will get people to take action more than anything else. Here's my $7 report versus here's my free report. I'm going to ship out to you, which one gets you more inspired to pull out your credit card. People love free stuff. We took a piece of our product out here. We put it out in front and we sold it for free. We started shipping and handling. We said the same hundred visitors through this funnel to a free CD page. To sell free CD, it's really easy. I didn't have to write a very big sales letter to do a lot of work. On average, we got 8% of people to take us up on a free CD offer. Immediately afterwards, we would sell this $197 product. We get about 25% of people say yes. The total money coming through here was $394, twice as much money, plus we got eight customers as opposed to one. Those customers now were able to build a better relationship with. They got one of our products in their hand. They experienced our training or whatever it is we were selling. It was easier to send those people up to our higher programs as well. That's kind of what the hundred visitor test is. Just understand why I'm so passionate about this free plus shipping thing. Why we need something free. There's tons of free stuff you can do. If you're on the superhero summit, I showed you tons of examples. We did t-shirts and books and CDs and DVDs and MP3 players and everything. To begin with, the easiest thing to start with is a free CD or a free DVD. It's just a million times easier to start with. For a couple reasons. One is a lot of times I'll make a free plus shipping thing and I'll launch it and it just bombs. If I would have got a free book, I would have had to write a book. I would have had to print a whole bunch of books. They don't really have print on demand books, at least not for very cheap. It would have been really expensive. With the CD, I can literally have an idea for a CD, sit down in front of a microphone, record myself talking for 45 minutes or so, burn it to a CD, email to distdelivered.com, get someone to knock out a quick design for the thing and within two days, boom, Distdelivered has it and I can start selling it. What's cool about Distdelivered is it's all print on demand. If nobody buys any CDs, it didn't cost you any money. If you sell 10, they charge you every time you sell one and they ship one out. Charge you, print it, ship it out. It's cool. It takes away the hard costs. Somebody has seen our .com secrets labs book. We launched that initially. We ordered 1,000 books. It was $10 or so books. It cost us $10,000 for that initial test. Then it worked and so then we ordered 5,000 at 10 bucks a piece. It cost us $50,000 for the next one. It can be really expensive that way. The whole free plus shipping thing is nice because if you do it to Distdelivered, it's print on demand and it doesn't cost you any additional money unless you make sales, which is always nice. That's what Distdelivered.com is. Now, Distdelivered, when you go there, there's a $50 setup fee. If you use the coupon code .com secrets, they knock that half so it's 25 bucks. Basically, you go and you record a CD and then on most CD, most computers have CD burners which is funny because back in the day, I don't know about you guys. We used to always use CD burners over and over and over again. I haven't used a CD burner in years. For this to work, you basically have to. Most computers still have them luckily. You record your CD whenever you burn it to a CD and you actually physically mail that CD into Distdelivered.com. If you don't know how to burn a CD, I recommend is find some teenager around you and ask them to do it for you. I promise you they know how to do it. That's what I had to do. I asked my little brother. I said, hey man, I need to burn the CD and I sent it to him and he did it and it worked. It's pretty simple. Let's see. What we use is, that's one of my buddies. He actually started doing this just for me. Then I was like, hey, I keep talking about this concept and a bunch of other people want it out too. So we set up a little website called blackboxpharmographics.com. Here's the page and he charges $200 to design your thing which fits the specs for distribution. You can get it done cheaper if you hire another designer. I just use this guy's name is Thane. He's done a ton of work for us and he's good at them. He doesn't. So $200 is what we pay for it. But if you want to get him someone else, I'm sure you can find someone else cheaper. But after you start to distribute, they'll give you all the specs and everything. You can get that to any designer and they can do it. Or if you want Distdelivered to do it or if you want Thane to do it, then he'll get it for $200. You just go to that website, blackboxpharmographics.com. Someone asked, yes, Distdelivered does give you a template for the graphics. Cool. All right. So there's the first thing is actually putting together your CD. Now one of the questions someone just asked is what should I actually put on my CD? That's a great question. I'm going to come back to this right here. So what should your free CD be? I would say typically it's going to be one of two different things. The first one is it's going to be an overview of what your system is. I look at this kind of book outline. When I'm going to read a book, I open the book, I look at the outline and kind of get just to what's happening. So if I was going to do a free CD, let's say I was teaching somebody, I was going to teach them how to lose weight. So my free CD would be an overview. It'd be like if they were from 30 minutes to an hour overview of me teaching them. Step 1, you're going to do this. Step 2, you're going to do this. Step 3, you're going to do this. I'm going to teach them in an hour or 30 minutes to an hour kind of the overview of my system. I would say that most of you guys have some kind of course, some kind of concept, something you're going to teach people. If you went through the four hour webinar and you should have before you came on this one, if not, go back and watch. We talked a lot about how to create your system. But you should have some kind of system that you're selling people. That's kind of the goal. So you have a system for losing weight, a system for investing money, a system for driving traffic online, a system for getting stronger, a system for reading faster, a system for whatever your system is. Everyone's got some kind of system they're teaching. A lot of times the free CD would be an overview of that system, which then makes the invisible funnel is usually in depth more of like a detailed three or four hours training on the deeper part of this. A lot of times my free CD would be the what. Here's what to do and then the invisible funnel would be here's how to do it. Does that make sense? You do my free CD, I'm not telling them how to do it. I'm not going to show you how I go to Google and how I buy this and all that kind of stuff. I'm going to tell you, I go to Google and then I buy ads and I tell them I'm telling you what. So a lot of times my CD is the what and then my invisible funnel is the how. So that's kind of one thing. The other thing I like to do a lot happens on free CDs, instead of an outliner or system, a lot of times I'll take what I'm going to teach over here. So the invisible funnel, I'm teaching my system for losing weight. I'm going to figure out what's the coolest, the sexiest, the most interesting part of my system. The one that's most fun to talk about, gets people most excited and to pull that one little piece out of my course and that's what the free CD is going to be about. So in this case my free CD is my number one secret to losing eight pounds in a weekend or whatever your best little nugget is. And that's what I'll do a lot of times is I'll pull out my best nugget from my whole training, put it over here and then we'll have someone buy that and then I upsell them into this is one piece of my system. Let me show you all 13 pieces here on this training. Does that make sense you guys? So choosing one of those two things I'm putting on my CD, either an overview of my system or I'm going through the what do they need to do or it's going to be the number one secret, the best piece, the golden nugget. If you guys look at our .com secrets labs offer, I'm sure a lot of you guys have seen that. That was, you know, that we were pulling out our best stuff, we were pulling out our best split testing results and that was what we did on that in that one. If you look at the, there's a new one launching soon called High Ticket Secrets. The free CD is an overview of my system. It's me teaching in an hour the kind of the overview of how I do what we're selling on that product. So it works good in both of those. Cindy asks me some questions. Russell, I want to do this and make money niche but I have no experience or results. Can I pull this off without being fake? So yeah, that's a great question. A lot of times when we've got a bunch of people actually on the slide that I know are doing this, well maybe they're not the expert but they're going to find an expert and they're going to interview them and put that interview on the CD. Can I start this business? I was the same way. I didn't know internet marketing and I wanted to learn it but I couldn't afford to buy all these big gurus courses and things like that. So what I would do is I would just call these guys up and I'd say, hey, I've got a list and the time I had a couple thousand people that I had built up and I said I would love to interview you and let my audience learn more about you. So I interview them about what they were doing and then that's how I started learning those things but then I could also sell interviews. In fact, the very first product that I made over a million dollars in sales with was an interview I did with a guy, his name was Vince James and he made a hundred million dollars in 23 months selling supplements through direct mail. I thought that was pretty dang cool and so I called him up and he let me interview him. He let me interview him for six hours which was pretty crazy and it was awesome and I interviewed him and I got the rights from him to sell that interview and from that we did over a million dollars in sales. So if you're not the expert right now that's fine. You can position yourself more as like the reporter and you can become a reporter and interview somebody to try to find out the secret, find out what that thing is. Okay, look at Oprah Winfrey. Okay, is she ever the expert in anything? No, but she was the reporter and she was finding the good information and she would interview people for the audience and you can do the same kind of thing as well. That helps. Cool, cool. guys this you have to understand marketing there's an art and there's a science okay and um and it's half art and half science so you guys are getting kind of both this right part of this is science like this the step by step process is the science the art is like what do you do here like people always ask what's better a headshot video or a PowerPoint video the answer is I don't know it depends it's it's art like what's going to capture someone the most um for me it's just I change things all the time like it's like pattern interrupts right if I do the same thing every single time people get used to it so I'm always trying to do different things just to stick out and be a little different so um yeah do whatever you're most comfortable with and and try some things and um there's a lot of ways to skin the cat right good questions um can you please go to the the next session time is it tomorrow next week it's like in two weeks I believe so I emailed it out the email you got you you got will try to better that but I usually just put an EDT and I hope people can kind of see their clocks around that so I apologize okay um um man we got lots of questions coming in all right next one here oops let me see okay how much must we spend to be prepared to spend to meet your target net uh so David my goal with any funnel is my goal is to put a dollar in and make more than a dollar back out um if I put a dollar in and I'm making 50 cents then something's broken in the funnel I gotta change it tweak it fix it um people always ask like what's your marketing budget my marketing budget is is unlimited in every situation anytime I have a funnel I put a dollar in I get a dollar 10 back out how many dollars should I put in the front I should put in a billion dollars a second right um because it's it's money it's more money's come back out so so don't worry about your marketing budget that's not the goal the goal is to build a funnel where you put a dollar in two days later you get two dollars back out and then you keep doing that over and over and over and over again so that's what we're trying to create here um so yeah hope that helps um can you create multiple funnels after the free CD it's like an invisible funnel which sells the same material as your video sales training yeah so um yeah this this uh I look at funnels like Legos okay there's tons of different ways to do so if you look at like the black box funnel this is actually like three funnels we built like Legos okay we used to have a free plus shipping funnel we always did and then invisible funnel we should always do the man application funnel and as I kind of put these three together in this order it just worked it made a lot of money so we call it the black box I thought it was kind of cool um but yeah you can move things around you can have you know three or four free CDs that lead into the same case study you can have um you know this thing happening here and then you can I mean it's like Legos you guys it's it's the art behind right you have art you can have fun you can move things around try things try you know it it's just fun that's that's the fun thing about marketing it's art and it's
